South Africa's Youth Innovation Initiative

Alpha-Gen Ready – Preparing the Next Generation for the Future

A collaboration of organisations empowering youth through leadership, technology education, innovation, creativity, and sustainability.

About the Initiative

Building a Future-Ready Generation

Alpha-Gen Ready brings together organisations focused on youth development, digital education, creative culture, and community innovation. Together, we create pathways for young people across South Africa to lead, learn, and thrive.

Our Mission

To equip young people with the skills, confidence, and opportunities needed to thrive in the future — through collaborative programs that bridge leadership, technology, and creativity.

Our Vision

A South Africa where every young person has access to future-ready education, mentorship, and the creative freedom to shape their communities and the world.

What We Focus On

Four Pillars of Impact

Leadership Development

Mentorship, leadership programs, and career development empowering youth to become community leaders.

Technology & Digital Skills

Coding, robotics, AI literacy, and digital innovation preparing youth for the tech-driven future.

Innovation & Critical Thinking

Technology debates, future thinking, and ethical discussions about emerging technologies.

Culture & Creative Expression

Creative youth culture including art, skateboarding, fashion, and community events.

Our Programs

Shaping Future Leaders

Leadership Legacy Academy

Intensive leadership and mentorship program for emerging young leaders.

Coding and Robotics Labs

Hands-on workshops teaching coding, robotics, and AI fundamentals.

Future Minds Tech Debate

Youth-driven debates on ethical technology, AI, and innovation.

Creative Culture Programs

Programs celebrating skateboarding, art, fashion, and creative expression.

Community Innovation Workshops

Collaborative workshops solving real-world community challenges.

Our Impact

Making a Difference

Community Events
Our Founders

The Founders

Afro-Planeteers Academy

Youth sustainability and environmental innovation academy empowering the next generation of African changemakers.

Visit

HACHAC Foundation

Help A Child Have A Career — dedicated to providing career development and educational support to underserved youth.

Visit

HashTheory – Tech Debate

Creative studio driving critical thinking through technology debates and innovation forums for young minds.

Visit

Others Worldwide

Skateboarding and creative youth culture platform building community through sport, art, and expression.

Visit

Partner With Us

Let's Build Together

Whether you're an organisation, educator, or community leader — we'd love to hear from you. Join the Alpha-Gen Ready movement and help shape the future.
